## 📋 Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

Fixes #(issue_number)

## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI change (non-breaking change which updates styling)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactor (non-breaking change which improves code quality)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test update

## 🧪 Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass locally (`pnpm test:unit`)
- [ ] Integration tests pass locally (`pnpm test:integration`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass locally (`pnpm test:e2e`)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested on mobile devices
- [ ] Tested with screen reader (if UI changes)

## 🔍 Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Code is properly commented
- [ ] No console.log statements left in code
- [ ] No hardcoded values (use environment variables)
- [ ] Proper error handling implemented
- [ ] TypeScript types are properly defined

## 🛡️ Security

- [ ] No sensitive data exposed
- [ ] Proper input validation added
- [ ] Authentication/authorization checked
- [ ] SQL injection prevention (if applicable)
- [ ] XSS prevention (if applicable)

## 📊 Performance

- [ ] No unnecessary re-renders (React/Svelte)
- [ ] Optimized database queries
- [ ] Images optimized (if applicable)
- [ ] Bundle size impact considered
- [ ] Lazy loading implemented (if applicable)

## 🗃️ Database Changes

- [ ] Migration created (if schema changes)
- [ ] RLS policies updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Seed data updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Backup strategy considered

## 📚 Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Component documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated

## 🚀 Deployment

- [ ] Environment variables documented (if new ones added)
- [ ] Deployment tested on preview
- [ ] No breaking changes for production
- [ ] Rollback plan considered (for major changes)
